feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: SOMI’s Nighttime Skincare Routine Go To Bed With Me

link.title: SOMI’s Nighttime Skincare Routine Go To Bed With Me

entry.content: Singer-songwriter SOMI gets a lot of questions about her skin, and she’s finally dropping the full routine. The K-pop star is a fan of double cleansing, layering on essences, and trying out new gadgets and skincare tools. Here, SOMI breaks down her nighttime routine for dry skin and shares her tips for keeping her skin hydrated and plump.
entry.summary: Singer-songwriter SOMI gets a lot of questions about her skin, and she’s finally dropping the full routine. The K-pop star is a fan of double cleansing, layering on essences, and trying out new gadgets and skincare tools. Here, SOMI breaks down her nighttime routine for dry skin and shares her tips for keeping her skin hydrated and plump.

entry.title: ஹோண்டா சிட்டி ஹைப்ரிட் வெளியீடு… எலெக்ட்ரிக் மோடில் வைத்து ஆபிஸ் போயிட்டு வந்துடலாம்!

link.title: ஹோண்டா சிட்டி ஹைப்ரிட் வெளியீடு… எலெக்ட்ரிக் மோடில் வைத்து ஆபிஸ் போயிட்டு வந்துடலாம்!

entry.content: புதிய ஹோண்டா சிட்டி காரில் அசத்தும் ஹைப்ரிட் தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன் கூடிய புதிய மாடல் வெளியிடப்பட்டு இருக்கிறது. இந்தியாவிலும் நிச்சயமாக எதிர்பார்க்கப்படும் இந்த புதிய சிட்டி கார் மாடல் குறித்த விபரங்களை இந்த வீடியோவில் பார்க்கலாம்.
entry.summary: புதிய ஹோண்டா சிட்டி காரில் அசத்தும் ஹைப்ரிட் தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன் கூடிய புதிய மாடல் வெளியிடப்பட்டு இருக்கிறது. இந்தியாவிலும் நிச்சயமாக எதிர்பார்க்கப்படும் இந்த புதிய சிட்டி கார் மாடல் குறித்த விபரங்களை இந்த வீடியோவில் பார்க்கலாம்.

entry.title: L’épisode de torchage de LyondellBasell en images

link.title: L’épisode de torchage de LyondellBasell en images

entry.content:
On vous en informait précédemment, les torchères de l’usine LyondellBasell à Berre dégageaient cet après-midi une impressionnante fumée noire qui pouvait, au premier coup d’œil, laisser penser à un départ d’incendie, il n’en est heureusement rien. Voici de nouvelles images tournées cette fois aux limites de la ville de Marignane.  …
Vidéo publiée le : 01/09/2020 à 18:16:00
Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :
entry.summary: On vous en informait précédemment, les torchères de l’usine LyondellBasell à Berre dégageaient cet après-midi une impressionnante fumée noire qui pouvait, au premier coup d’œil, laisser penser à un départ d’incendie, il n’en est heureusement rien. Voici de nouvelles images tournées cette fois aux limites de la ville de Marignane. … Vidéo publiée le : 01/09/2020 à 18:16:00 Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :

entry.title: CAMEROONIAN PRESS REVIEW OF AUGUST 27, 2020

link.title: CAMEROONIAN PRESS REVIEW OF AUGUST 27, 2020

entry.content: English newspapers published this Thursday August 27 talk about diverse issues including Canada’s assistance to Cameroon ahead of the upcoming academic year, Cameroon and the rest of Africa having been officially declared wild polio-free.
entry.summary: English newspapers published this Thursday August 27 talk about diverse issues including Canada’s assistance to Cameroon ahead of the upcoming academic year, Cameroon and the rest of Africa having been officially declared wild polio-free.

#TwinkleKhanna #Akshaykumar

entry.title: Zhoya : «Je suis vraiment content» - Athlétisme - Meeting de Marseille

link.title: Zhoya : «Je suis vraiment content» - Athlétisme - Meeting de Marseille

entry.content: VIDÉO ATHLÉTISME - Même s’il n’a pas battu le record du monde du 110 m haies juniors, Sasha Zhoya s’est dit content de sa course de rentrée à Marseille.
entry.summary: VIDÉO ATHLÉTISME - Même s’il n’a pas battu le record du monde du 110 m haies juniors, Sasha Zhoya s’est dit content de sa course de rentrée à Marseille.

link.title: La France classe 21 départements en zone de circulation active du coronavirus

entry.title: Canada’s Drag Race Season 1 Ep. 10: U Wear It Well Full Series Crave

link.title: Canada’s Drag Race Season 1 Ep. 10: U Wear It Well Full Series Crave

entry.content:
Canada’s Drag Race Season 1 Episode 10
Click Here : 【⇊⇊⇊】
[[ ]]
Storyline :
The final three Queens write, record, and perform an all-new remix of a RuPaul classic, and the winner of Canada’s Drag Race is crowned. This week’s guest host is TV personality Traci Melchor who joins judges Brooke Lynn Hytes, Jeffrey Bowyer-Chapman, and Stacey McKenzie to crown the winner.
Genre : Reality
Network : Crave
entry.summary: Canada’s Drag Race Season 1 Episode 10 Click Here : 【⇊⇊⇊】 [[ ]] Storyline : The final three Queens write, record, and perform an all-new remix of a RuPaul classic, and the winner of Canada’s Drag Race is crowned. This week’s guest host is TV personality Traci Melchor who joins judges Brooke Lynn Hytes, Jeffrey Bowyer-Chapman, and Stacey McKenzie to crown the winner. Genre : Reality Network : Crave

entry.title: ‘Permettre à la France de relever le défi du siècle, la transformation écologique’, l’autre défi du plan de relance selon Antoine Frérot

link.title: ‘Permettre à la France de relever le défi du siècle, la transformation écologique’, l’autre défi du plan de relance selon Antoine Frérot

entry.content:
ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos
Le Président directeur général de Véolia Antoine Frérot est l’invité de la matinale d’Europe 1 à quelques heures de la présentation du plan de relance par le gouvernement, estimé à 100 milliards d’euros. Si l’argent doit servir à aider les entreprises, il doit aussi permettre, selon lui, à la France d’avancer en matière d’écologie.
Retrouvez "L’interview politique" sur :
LE DIRECT :
Nos nouveautés :
Retrouvez-nous sur :
Notre site :
Facebook :
Twitter :
Google + :
Pinterest :
entry.summary: ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos Le Président directeur général de Véolia Antoine Frérot est l’invité de la matinale d’Europe 1 à quelques heures de la présentation du plan de relance par le gouvernement, estimé à 100 milliards d’euros. Si l’argent doit servir à aider les entreprises, il doit aussi permettre, selon lui, à la France d’avancer en matière d’écologie. Retrouvez "L’interview politique" sur : LE DIRECT : Nos nouveautés : Retrouvez-nous sur : Notre site : Facebook : Twitter : Google + : Pinterest :

entry.title: Kumar Vishwas ने मजेदार वीडियो शेयर कर बताया रसोड़े में कौन था ? वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Kumar Vishwas ने मजेदार वीडियो शेयर कर बताया रसोड़े में कौन था ? वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
These days, the video of who was among the cooks is trending very fast on social media. The rap song made on this is also liked by the people. This video is being shared a lot. So there are these funny mimes that have dominated social media. People are using this video in different ways. Now the famous poet Dr. Kumar Vishwas has tweeted this line and asked, ‘Who was there in the cook?’ She was, I was, who was’.
सोशल मीडिया पर इन दिनों रसोड़े में कौन था वीडियो बहुत तेजी से ट्रेंड कर रहा है. इस पर बना रैप सॉन्ग भी लोगों खूब पसंद आ रहा है. इस वीडियो को खूब शेयर किया जा रहा है. तो वहीं इस बने मजेदार मीम्स सोशल मीडिया पर छाए हुए हैं. लोग अलग अलग तरह से इस वीडियो का इस्तेमाल कर रहे हैं. अब इसी लाइन को मशहूर कवि डॉक्टर कुमार विश्वास ने ट्वीट करते हुए पूछा है कि ‘रसोड़े में कौन था?’ ये थीं, मैं था, कौन था’.
#KumarVishwas #RasodeMeKaunTha #AssamPolice
entry.summary: These days, the video of who was among the cooks is trending very fast on social media. The rap song made on this is also liked by the people. This video is being shared a lot. So there are these funny mimes that have dominated social media. People are using this video in different ways. Now the famous poet Dr. Kumar Vishwas has tweeted this line and asked, ‘Who was there in the cook?’ She was, I was, who was’. सोशल मीडिया पर इन दिनों रसोड़े में कौन था वीडियो बहुत तेजी से ट्रेंड कर रहा है. इस पर बना रैप सॉन्ग भी लोगों खूब पसंद आ रहा है. इस वीडियो को खूब शेयर किया जा रहा है. तो वहीं इस बने मजेदार मीम्स सोशल मीडिया पर छाए हुए हैं. लोग अलग अलग तरह से इस वीडियो का इस्तेमाल कर रहे हैं. अब इसी लाइन को मशहूर कवि डॉक्टर कुमार विश्वास ने ट्वीट करते हुए पूछा है कि ‘रसोड़े में कौन था?’ ये थीं, मैं था, कौन था’. #KumarVishwas #RasodeMeKaunTha #AssamPolice

entry.title: Anadolu Quartet & Cem Erdost İleri - Yandı Ha Yandı

link.title: Anadolu Quartet & Cem Erdost İleri - Yandı Ha Yandı

entry.content:
Anadolu Quartet & Cem Erdost İleri - Yandı Ha Yandı
Abone Olmak İçin:
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Spotify:
Apple Music:
Web Sitesi:
Cem Erdost İleri Resmi Youtube Kanalı:
Şarkı Sözleri (Lyrics):
Bir güzelin hasretinden ahından
Tutuştu her yanım da yandı ha yandı
Aşık oldum onun mah cemaline
Aşkından her yanım da yandı ha yandı
Benim derdim senin derdine taydır
Bir güzel sevmişem kaşları yaydır
Saatim gün geçer her günüm aydır
Üçyüzatmışbeş günüm de yandı ha yandı
Sıtkı’yam çekmişem gayet zarı ben
Dilerim ki muradıma erem ben
Bir hayırsız yar elinde kaldım ben
Ağzımda dillerim yandı ha yandı
Söz: Sıdkı Baba
Kaynak Kişi: Aşık Sadık Doğanay
Hasret Düzeni (Kütahya Düzeni) Bağlama: Cem Erdost İleri
Ahmet Tirgil: I. Violin
Özgür Kement: II. Violin
Ozan Nabi Akın: Viola
Ruşen Arslanargun: Cello
Arranje : Ahmet Tirgil
Video Kurgu : Burcu Yeşilbaş
entry.summary: Anadolu Quartet & Cem Erdost İleri - Yandı Ha Yandı Abone Olmak İçin: Instagram: Facebook: Twitter: Spotify: Apple Music: Web Sitesi: Cem Erdost İleri Resmi Youtube Kanalı: Şarkı Sözleri (Lyrics): Bir güzelin hasretinden ahından Tutuştu her yanım da yandı ha yandı Aşık oldum onun mah cemaline Aşkından her yanım da yandı ha yandı Benim derdim senin derdine taydır Bir güzel sevmişem kaşları yaydır Saatim gün geçer her günüm aydır Üçyüzatmışbeş günüm de yandı ha yandı Sıtkı’yam çekmişem gayet zarı ben Dilerim ki muradıma erem ben Bir hayırsız yar elinde kaldım ben Ağzımda dillerim yandı ha yandı Söz: Sıdkı Baba Kaynak Kişi: Aşık Sadık Doğanay Hasret Düzeni (Kütahya Düzeni) Bağlama: Cem Erdost İleri Ahmet Tirgil: I. Violin Özgür Kement: II. Violin Ozan Nabi Akın: Viola Ruşen Arslanargun: Cello Arranje : Ahmet Tirgil Video Kurgu : Burcu Yeşilbaş

entry.title: ‘Ensauvagement’: Bruno Bonnell (LaREM) appelle le ministre de l’Intérieur à faire ‘attention à la sémantique’

link.title: ‘Ensauvagement’: Bruno Bonnell (LaREM) appelle le ministre de l’Intérieur à faire ‘attention à la sémantique’

entry.content: Invité de BFMTV ce mardi soir, le député LaREM Bruno Bonnell s’est exprimé sur le différend entre Gérald Darmanin et Eric Dupond-Moretti à propos de l’emploi du terme "ensauvagement" par le ministre de l’Intérieur.
entry.summary: Invité de BFMTV ce mardi soir, le député LaREM Bruno Bonnell s’est exprimé sur le différend entre Gérald Darmanin et Eric Dupond-Moretti à propos de l’emploi du terme "ensauvagement" par le ministre de l’Intérieur.

entry.title: Transplant. Chat with Joseph Kay: Creator Executive Producer (Captioned by Zubtitle)

link.title: Transplant. Chat with Joseph Kay: Creator Executive Producer (Captioned by Zubtitle)

entry.content:
Transplant: Series Premiere (NBC) Stars: Hamza Haq, Laurence Leboeuf, John Hannah
The 13-episode series centers on Dr. Bashir “Bash” Hamed, a Syrian doctor with battle-tested skills in emergency medicine who fled his country with his younger sister, Amira. Together they struggle to build a new life in Canada as Bash strives to rebuild his career in medicine.
NBC has a long and storied history with successful medical series, including, of course, “ER” and its current hits “New Amsterdam” and “Chicago Med.”
Post-Produced for Cinemania.TV by Julio Neri
entry.summary: Transplant: Series Premiere (NBC) Stars: Hamza Haq, Laurence Leboeuf, John Hannah The 13-episode series centers on Dr. Bashir “Bash” Hamed, a Syrian doctor with battle-tested skills in emergency medicine who fled his country with his younger sister, Amira. Together they struggle to build a new life in Canada as Bash strives to rebuild his career in medicine. NBC has a long and storied history with successful medical series, including, of course, “ER” and its current hits “New Amsterdam” and “Chicago Med.” Post-Produced for Cinemania.TV by Julio Neri

entry.title: The hidden gem by Mida creek conservation group

link.title: The hidden gem by Mida creek conservation group

entry.content: A renowned woman conservationist in Mida Creek area of Kilifi county has opened a restaurant at the heart of the chilling mangrove protection area.
entry.summary: A renowned woman conservationist in Mida Creek area of Kilifi county has opened a restaurant at the heart of the chilling mangrove protection area.

entry.title: Dwayne Johnson Says He And His Family Recovered From Covid-19 Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Dwayne Johnson Says He And His Family Recovered From Covid-19 Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson: Actor and family had Covid-19
#TheRock
#DwayneJohnson
#Coronavirus
#Covid19
రెజ్లింగ్ త‌ర్వాత హాలీవుడ్‌లో‌కి ప్ర‌వేశించి‌న ఆయ‌న అక్క‌డ కూడా త‌న స‌త్తా చాటుతున్నారు. తాజాగా ఆయ‌న కుటుంబం క‌రోనా బారిన ప‌డింది. ఈ విష‌యాన్ని డ్వేన్ జాన్స‌న్ ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో బుధ‌వారం వీడియో ద్వారా వెల్ల‌డించారు. ఇందులో ఆయ‌న మాట్లాడుతూ.. త‌న‌తో పాటు కుటుంబానికంత‌టికీ క‌రోనా వ‌చ్చింద‌ని తెలిపారు
entry.summary: Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson: Actor and family had Covid-19 #TheRock #DwayneJohnson #Coronavirus #Covid19 రెజ్లింగ్ త‌ర్వాత హాలీవుడ్‌లో‌కి ప్ర‌వేశించి‌న ఆయ‌న అక్క‌డ కూడా త‌న స‌త్తా చాటుతున్నారు. తాజాగా ఆయ‌న కుటుంబం క‌రోనా బారిన ప‌డింది. ఈ విష‌యాన్ని డ్వేన్ జాన్స‌న్ ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో బుధ‌వారం వీడియో ద్వారా వెల్ల‌డించారు. ఇందులో ఆయ‌న మాట్లాడుతూ.. త‌న‌తో పాటు కుటుంబానికంత‌టికీ క‌రోనా వ‌చ్చింద‌ని తెలిపారు

entry.title: [Pops in Seoul] Burning Power~♬ Today’s game♟ for Maka’Maka(마카마카) - ‘Shark fishing of terror!!’

link.title: [Pops in Seoul] Burning Power~♬ Today’s game♟ for Maka’Maka(마카마카) - ‘Shark fishing of terror!!’

entry.content:
The game time we’ve all been waiting for
Today’s POPS PLAY is the Shark fishing of terror~!!
They must go around in turns and get the fish out of the shark’s mouth
The unlucky member gets the shark’s attack!
Luck is needed rather than talent!!
Shall we play?
우리 모두가 기다리던 게임 시간
오늘의 POPS PLAY는 공포의 상어 낚시~!!
돌아가면서 상어의 입에서 물고기를 꺼내야 합니다
불운한 멤버는 상어의 공격을 받는다!
재능보다는 행운이 필요해요!!
놀아 볼까요?
entry.summary: The game time we’ve all been waiting for Today’s POPS PLAY is the Shark fishing of terror~!! They must go around in turns and get the fish out of the shark’s mouth The unlucky member gets the shark’s attack! Luck is needed rather than talent!! Shall we play? 우리 모두가 기다리던 게임 시간 오늘의 POPS PLAY는 공포의 상어 낚시~!! 돌아가면서 상어의 입에서 물고기를 꺼내야 합니다 불운한 멤버는 상어의 공격을 받는다! 재능보다는 행운이 필요해요!! 놀아 볼까요?

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Stage 7 - Van Aert makes it two despite the wind !

link.title: #TDF2020 - Stage 7 - Van Aert makes it two despite the wind !

entry.content:
Discover the highlights of Tour de France 2020’s Stage 7 - Millau / Lavaur.
Stage Ranking:
1 - VAN AERT Wout (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA)
2 - HAGEN Edvald (NTT PRO CYCLING TEAM)
3 - COQUARD Bryan (B&B HOTELS - VITAL CONCEPT P / B KTM)
General Ranking:
1 - YATES Adam (MITCHELTON - SCOTT)
2 - ROGLIC Primož (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA)
3 - MARTIN Guillaume (COFIDIS)
More information on:
Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Discover the highlights of Tour de France 2020’s Stage 7 - Millau / Lavaur. Stage Ranking: 1 - VAN AERT Wout (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA) 2 - HAGEN Edvald (NTT PRO CYCLING TEAM) 3 - COQUARD Bryan (B&B HOTELS - VITAL CONCEPT P / B KTM) General Ranking: 1 - YATES Adam (MITCHELTON - SCOTT) 2 - ROGLIC Primož (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA) 3 - MARTIN Guillaume (COFIDIS) More information on: Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
